subcodes.first_line: O radiant candle! That which thou hadst written was observed, and that which was recorded became manifest [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای شمع روشن آنچه مرقوم نموده بودید ملاحظه گردید و آنچه مسطور بود مشهود شد فی
subcodes.subjects: @forgiveness; grace; bounty; mercy; compassion of God, @praise and encouragement, @progressive revelation; renewal of religion
